notes: Core structure exists but the maze layout is broken (only 26 rows defined vs 31 expected, ghost house area malformed), pac-man movement collision detection is unreliable causing wall clipping, ghosts frequently get stuck or move erratically due to flawed intersection logic, and the overall game is barely playable despite having the right architectural bones.

Solid playable approximation with responsive controls and recognizable presentation, but ghost/maze logic is simplified and movement-collision behavior is not faithful enough for a strong Pac-Man benchmark score.
